nextRetryTimeUnit.summary: Time units for delaying backward based on execution time

nextRetryTimeValue.summary: According to the delay time counted from the execution time backwards, for example, if this value is set to 1 under the MINUTES unit, it means the function will be re-executed 1 minute after execution.

periodTimeUnit.summary: The time unit calculated backward based on the next execution time

periodTimeValue.summary: The time calculated based on the next execution time. For example, under the MINUTES unit, if this value is set to 1, it means the specified function will be executed again 1 minute after execution.

periodTimeUnit.summary: The time unit calculated backward based on the next execution time

periodTimeValue.summary: The time calculated based on the next execution time. For example, under the MINUTES unit, if this value is set to 1, it means the specified function will be executed again 1 minute after execution.

eip.EipAlarmRule.summary: Rule for monitoring integration interface metrics and triggering alerts

techName.summary: Technical name of the alarm rule

name.summary: Human-readable name for the alarm rule

metricType.summary: Type of metric being monitored (failure count or failure rate)

minCallCount.summary: Minimum number of calls required in time window to trigger alarm (only for failure rate)

enabled.summary: Whether this alarm rule is active

eipInterface.summary: The integration interface this rule monitors

sender.summary: Email address for sending alarm notifications

receivers.summary: People who will receive alarm notifications

emailTemplateName.summary: Name of the email template for alarm notifications

emailTemplate.summary: Email template used for alarm notifications (only when notification type is email)

webhookUrl.summary: Webhook callback URL for robot messages (only when notification type is webhook)

signSecret.summary: Secret key for webhook message signing

notifyContent.summary: Content of the alarm notification message (only when notification type is webhook)

alertTime.summary: Timestamp when the alarm rule was triggered

interfaceName.summary: Name of the interface that triggered the alarm

interfaceTechName.summary: Technical name of the interface that triggered the alarm

eipInterface.summary: The interface that was monitored and triggered the alarm

ruleTechName.summary: Technical name of the alarm rule that was triggered

ruleName.summary: Human-readable name of the alarm rule that was triggered

alarmRule.summary: The specific alarm rule that was triggered

metricType.summary: Type of metric that exceeded the threshold

notifyStatus.summary: Status of the notification delivery attempt

totalSum.summary: Total number of interface calls in the monitoring period

failRate.summary: Percentage of failed calls compared to total calls

threshold.summary: Threshold value that was exceeded to trigger the alarm

timeWindow.summary: Time range during which the metric was measured

notifyType.summary: Method used for sending the alarm notification

errorMsg.summary: Error details if notification delivery failed

eip.EipAlarmStat.summary: Statistical data for alarm rule evaluation

ruleName.summary: Name of the alarm rule these statistics belong to

interfaceName.summary: Name of the interface being monitored

interfaceTechName.summary: Technical name of the interface being monitored

ruleTechName.summary: Technical name of the alarm rule

start.summary: Start timestamp for the statistical period (Unix timestamp)

end.summary: End timestamp for the statistical period (Unix timestamp)

totalSum.summary: Total number of interface invocations during the period

failSum.summary: Number of failed interface invocations during the period

eip.EipAlarmRuleProxy.summary: Proxy model for integration interface alarm rules with additional threshold fields

thresholdForCount.summary: Please enter failure count threshold (positive integer, range: 1-9999)
